name: AAUW Educational Foundation Fellowships

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or permanent resident (domestic); international (select programs)
eligibility.other_requirements: Women pursuing graduate or postdoctoral study; some undergraduate programs; career development grants available

stackable_notes: External fellowship; generally stackable at graduate level.
notes: Primarily graduate/postdoctoral — limited undergraduate options. Advisors working with women continuing to grad school should flag this.
